business.geography_hint: US-based (USD pricing), serving travel to Italy

engine.ladder_reasoning: Sells defined expertise (custom Italy itinerary planning + paid consulting calls) built on a named founder's story, process, and testimonials — the visitor is trusting a person/firm, not evaluating a product or browsing a gallery.

goal.one_action: book a call / get in touch to start custom trip planning (or book a paid consulting call)

structure.archetype_note: Classic trust/consultant multipage: founder story + service explainer + process + tiered paid calls + FAQ + contact, all funneling to a Calendly booking.

mapped.observed_as: Italian Travel - Bespoke Travel Planning - Personalized Tours

Our Planning Style: See Italy. Experience Italy. Live Italy

unmapped.observed: GIVE THE GIFT OF ITALY TRAVEL PLANNING (gift certificate promo)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A gift-certificate purchase promo isn't a canonical section id nor a straightforward pricing tier

unmapped.observed: When to Visit: Experience Italy Year-Round (seasonal guidance)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Educational/advisory content block with no direct canonical analog

proposed_new.name: media-hub
proposed_new.evidence: 'Rediscover Italy Podcast' is a standing owned podcast content property linked from nav

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; all pages returned readable text, clear engine/goal/structure signals

gap_findings: Gift-certificate purchase is a distinct monetization path (buy a giftable service voucher) that neither packages nor storefront-checkout cleanly expresses when there is no on-site cart

Paid consulting calls at fixed tiers booked via Calendly blur 'packages' (price display) with a delegated booking mechanism — the taxonomy has no clean 'paid single-session booking' expression short of a full booking-wizard
